messages.text:
👋 Welcome! I'm your virtual assistant.

Could you please tell me your *name*? 😊

Nice to meet you, Aslok! 👋

How can I help you today?
• Type *fees* for pricing info
• Type *hostel* for hostel details
• Or just ask your question!

💰 *Fee Structure*

• Foundation Course: ₹15,000/year
• Standard Course: ₹25,000/year
• Premium Course: ₹40,000/year

All plans include study material & doubt sessions.
Reply *hostel* for accommodation info.

🏠 *Hostel Information*

• Boys Hostel: ₹8,000/month
• Girls Hostel: ₹8,500/month
• Facilities: WiFi, AC rooms, Mess, Gym
• Availability: Limited seats

Contact us at +91-XXXXXXXXXX to book.

🙏 Thanks Aslok! We received your message.

Our team will contact you shortly. ✅
You can also ask about *fees* or *hostel*.
